scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run prisma:generate && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run lint && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/admin run lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run typecheck && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/admin run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run test --runInBand && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/admin run test --run
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run build && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/admin run build
scripts.verify:api: pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run typecheck && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run test && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run prisma:validate && pnpm --filter @welfare-mall/api run openapi:generate
